title: paspalum scandens
intro: Paspalum scandens, also known as the climbing paspalum, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paspalum scandens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. In traditional herbal medicine, Paspalum scandens is prepared as a tea, infused oil, or poultice to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
